Deprecated API

Contents

  • Deprecated Methods
  • Deprecated Constructors
  • Deprecated Methods 
    Method and Description
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory.createClient(InetAddress, int)
    use ExecutionServerFactory.createClient()
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory.createLocalServer()
    please use instead ExecutionServerFactory.createLocalServer(IExecutionHandler)
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase.deleteProject(String)
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer.getTestCaseStatus(Job...)
    please use the information available in ExecuteTestCaseJob
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer.loadTestSuiteFromFile(File)
    Please use IExecutionServer.loadTestSuiteFromFile(String, String)
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IProjectManager.publishProject(File, int)
    use IProjectManager.publishProject(String, File, int)
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase.publishProject(URI, String, int, ExecutorRequirements) 
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase.setJVMArguments(Map<String, String>)
    Use #setJVMArguments(List)
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer.startServer(int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler)
    should not be used, will throw an exception if called by the client
  • Deprecated Constructors 
    Constructor and Description
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient(InetAddress, int, ExecutionServerMode)
    Use RemoteExecutionClient.RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode)
    com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient(InetAddress, int, ExecutionServerMode, ILogModelFactory)
    use RemoteExecutionClient.RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode, ILogModelFactory)
